---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new tool, syntax feature, example score, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: km-vibecoder
---

## Summary

A short description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve, or what workflow does it enable?

## Proposed Approach

If you have a specific design in mind, describe it here. For syntax changes, include example `.mmd` that shows the proposed syntax. For tooling changes, sketch the CLI interface.

```
# example .mmd or CLI sketch
```

## Spec Impact

Does this require a change to `spec/musical-markdown-spec.md`? If so, note which section(s) would need updating.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help the maintainer evaluate this request.
